Shattered Emerald of Corruption  
 

Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Shattered Emerald of Corruption
Lore Item No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Misc
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Jasterr Mereel
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 11:57:46
Page Updated:Mon Oct 3rd, 2022

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 50
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Plane of Hate
NPC Name
an ashenbone broodmaster
Avatar of Abhorrence
Coercer T`vala
Grandmaster R`Tal
Innoruuk - Plane of Hate
Lord of Ire
Lord of Loathing
Magi P`Tasa
Master of Spite
Mistress of Scorn

Plane of Hate 2.0
NPC Name
Maestro of Rancor - Plane of Hate
Vicar M`Kari

Plane of Hate B
NPC Name
a hideous rat
an eerie chest
Avatar of Abhorrence
Coercer T`Vala
Lord of Ire
Lord of Loathing
Master of Spite
Master R`Tal

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

Burning Woods
Quest Name
Ranger Epic: Swiftwind and Earthcaller

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Permafrost Keep
Plane of Hate
Plane of Hate 2.0
Plane of Hate B

Vicar M'Kari just dropped the Shattered Emerald of Corruption in normal Plane of Hate on 12/23/2024 at 12:25 EST.

# Jun 30 2022 at 7:33 PM Rating: Decent
trajhver
Scholar
18 posts
Can add Lord of Loathing to the list of droppers in PoH b. Guessing any of the lower level rares (non dark elfs?) can drop this? Not sure how many rares I killed. Spent a weekend clearing almost non stop, since then have just been logging on with ranger periodically to look for and kill any rares I see.

SEOC Drop on Bertoxx Apr 30/2021
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2021 at 5:07 PM Rating: Decent
Vysarane
1 post
This piece dropped for me after 2.5 days and around 15 hours of camping POF killing the mini bosses. I looted this item from the first spawn that I saw of an Eerie Chest. Also dropped with a revultant whip. I was a proud ranger that day as this completed my epic 1.0.

▲ Page top
Can this be MQed?
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2019 at 11:57 PM Rating: Decent
Gandalfer
Scholar
37 posts
They didn't take MQing away, just changed the rules in later expansions so that MQing wasn't possible. MQing anything is still possible with Epic 1.0s
▲ Page top
Master R'Tal dropped
QuoteReply
# Aug 26 2014 at 9:30 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1715559370129
View User Forum
169 posts
Spent all day yesterday killing minis and Innoruuk himself, no Shattered Emeral of Corruption, even off Innie. Logged for a bit and came back to find someone else killing for it, so to be polite, I camped out for the day. Came back this morning, checked track and found that Magi P'Tasa was up. Killed him, and he didn't drop the emerald. I had seen Master R'Tal on track, they show up next to each other, so I went and killed him, even though he is not listed as dropping the Emerald. He only had 2 items on him, first was a "Slowstone Amber", Monk only slow item, lore, but not no drop. Second item was the Shattered Emerald. Good luck to all you other Rangers, and remember, just because it doesn't show they drop it, kill 'em all and let Innoruuk sort 'em out. You may just get lucky like I did.
▲ Page top
shattered emerald of corruption - drop
QuoteReply
# Dec 10 2013 at 12:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1617581813001
5 posts
dropped off magi P'Tasa today after 20 visits farming all the named for it and many hours of hunting them.
good luck, takes patients sometimes
▲ Page top
Locations
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2013 at 11:13 AM Rating: Decent
nyteshayd
View User Forum
Scholar
530 posts
With the exception of Innoruuk (whose location should be obvious just glancing at the map, and has no PH), here are the map locations of all the listed carriers of the Shattered Emerald of Corruption. Add them to [EQ folder]\maps\hateplaneb_1.txt before zoning into Plane of Hate, and they'll all be marked.

P 825.7312, -355.6487, 1.0020, 127, 0, 0, 3, a_hideous_rat
P 193.9785, -243.5105, 1.0020, 127, 0, 0, 3, an_ashenbone_broodmaster
P 223.6948, -614.4679, 1.0020, 127, 0, 0, 3, an_eerie_chest
P 0.4816, -571.1851, 21.0020, 127, 0, 0, 3, Avatar_of_Abhorrence
P -17.3669, -776.2636, 5.0020, 127, 0, 0, 3, Coercer_T`Vala
P 533.3797, -214.3902, 1.0020, 127, 0, 0, 3, Master_R`Tal
P 597.2337, -501.1247, 1.0020, 127, 0, 0, 3, Lord_of_Ire
P 45.6005, -451.6203, 5.0020, 127, 0, 0, 3, Lord_of_Loathing
P 133.0445, 481.0157, 26.2989, 127, 0, 0, 3, Maestro_of_Rancor
P 394.7712, -348.1575, 1.0020, 127, 0, 0, 3, Magi_P`Tasa
P 585.7653, -64.0690, 1.0020, 127, 0, 0, 3, Master_of_Spite
P 448.1663, -141.3920, 1.0020, 127, 0, 0, 3, Mistress_of_Scorn
P 2.0697, -402.0289, 21.0020, 127, 0, 0, 3, Vicar_M`Kari


Here are a few other named markers I've collected over the years as well.

P 621.9965, 214.3910, 2.8444, 127, 0, 0, 3, thought_destroyer
P -148.1374, 798.7355, 1.2989, 127, 0, 0, 3, Archon_G`Uvinn
P 765.0787, -183.9590, 3.0020, 0, 0, 127, 3, Deathrot_Knight
P 534.4297, 194.2353, 1.0020, 240, 0, 0, 3, Grotesque_Rat
P 427.9627, 349.1215, 3.9626, 0, 0, 240, 3, Corrupter_of_Life
P -137.3451, 222.2706, 2.8421, 127, 0, 0, 3, Sorceror_C`Gazin
P -418.9528, 732.0339, 22.8990, 127, 0, 0, 3, Overlord_R`Gahbsa
P -113.2196, 46.7984, 4.7905, 127, 0, 0, 3, Master_of_Vengeance
P 178.4931, 118.9849, 27.8491, 127, 0, 0, 3, Hand_of_the_Maestro
____________________________
Jiriki Sa`Onserei, 120/67k AA Wood Elf Ranger
Anadriel Starfire, 120/46k AA High Elf Mage

Headshot!
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2012 at 8:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1638145293605
8 posts
Few hours of killing place holders and Lord Ire popped. Killed him and there it was!
During my rounds I ran head first into Deathrot. Let the merc tank him and was going to pop trueshot and let fly some arrows when BAM!!! Dead from a headshot!!
Sweet!!

Derryan
Ranger of 79 seasons
All hail Karana
